svg.title: Options 2a vs 2b – how they diverge after the shared foundation
svg.desc: Both options share the same Listing table output from enrichers. In 2a, a SOURCE_SYSTEM column is added to the Listing table, exposed via the serving layer, requiring a change to RDM Cache and Instrument Static library before Autobot/BBF can use it. In 2b, TopicLoader reads the new EquinoxService and writes instrument IDs into topic tables in the REF schema. The existing serving layer already exposes topic data so no RDM Cache change is needed. Autobot/BBF checks topic membership directly.
svg.text: Both options start from the same Listing table output
